name: X-Golf Rochester Hills
address: 1134 S Rochester Rd, Rochester Hills, MI 48307
about: X-Golf Rochester Hills offers state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators with high accuracy and realism. The venue provides a modern environment where players can play, train, and entertain, featuring a full bar with beer, wine, and liquor, along with shareable bites and small snacks. Each simulator bay accommodates up to 6 people, making it suitable for groups, and complimentary rental sets are available. The facility is designed to cater to a wide range of skill levels and interests, from casual play to serious training and competitive leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from advanced simulator technology
Flexible booking system with specials and options for various group sizes
Professional coaching available to improve skills using cutting-edge technology
Full bar and food options available for a complete entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites and small snacks available
Full bar with beer, wine, and liquor

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary rental sets are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full bar with beer, wine, and liquor, along with shareable bites and small snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes 1 hour for an individual player to finish 18 holes. For multiple players, an additional hour per person may be needed depending on skill level.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages.
